fault_hypothesis: The logic to cap the counter is incorrect. On line 72, when the updated value exceeds the cap, it is set to `cap - 1` instead of being clamped to `cap`.

constraints.intent: The value assigned when capping should be the cap itself, not one less.

spec.expr: (cap is None or current__1 < cap) or (updated__3 == cap)

constraints.intent: If the counter was already at or above the cap, the new value must be the cap.
When the counter exceeds the cap, it should be clamped to the cap value.
